data.title: Microsoft chooses Eyelit Technologies for lab traceability and quality; Eyelit's MOM Solution Suite to support multiple labs globally.
data.description: In Holmdel, New Jersey, Eyelit Technologies revealed today that Microsoft has chosen its Manufacturing Operations Management (MOM) Solution Suite to enhance traceability and quality control in numerous labs worldwide. The solution, which includes Eyelit’s MES and QMS modules, aims to streamline semiconductor and specialty processing workflows on a large scale. This partnership signifies a significant step forward in optimizing planning, scheduling, and execution systems for manufacturers, showcasing Eyelit’s expertise in this area.

data.title: Forescout named Keysight's Tech Partner of the Year for enhancing visibility and reducing cyber risk across sectors.
data.description: Forescout Technologies, a cybersecurity leader, revealed that it has been selected as the Network Visibility Tech Partner of the Year by Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS). This award was presented by Keysight’s Network Visibility business unit and highlights the successful partnership between the two companies. Through this collaboration, they aim to enhance visibility, lower cyber risk, and simplify operations in IT, OT, IoT, and IoMT landscapes. This achievement showcases the valuable cooperation between Forescout and Keysight in delivering effective solutions.

data.title: MindWalk discovers antibodies targeting pathogenic TDP-43 in neuro diseases like ALS, FTD, and Alzheimer’s. $HYFT's breakthrough news.
data.description: In Victoria, British Columbia, MindWalk Holdings Corp. (Nasdaq: HYFT) revealed their breakthrough discovery and confirmation of monoclonal antibodies and intrabodies that specifically attack misfolded, harmful TDP-43 protein. This protein is linked to amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), frontotemporal dementia (FTD), and specific types of Alzheimer’s disease. The research highlights MindWalk’s capacity to differentiate between toxic and non-toxic proteins with utmost structural accuracy.

data.title: Emapta offers AI courses to its workforce of 12,000 for upskilling. 44% companies are investing in AI outsourcing.
data.description: In the Philippines, Emapta, a prominent provider of offshore AI-ready staffing and advisory services, has revealed the launch of a widened selection of free AI courses. These courses are aimed at enhancing the skills of their extensive workforce, which currently stands at 12,000 employees. The necessity for AI training among employees is increasing significantly, and outsourcing is seen as a crucial component. Recent studies have indicated that around 44% of businesses are enlarging their outsourcing operations to take advantage of AI technologies and data capabilities.

data.title: Rapyd's 2026 report: Stablecoins go mainstream, 1 in 5 businesses use them, 76% see future growth.
data.description: In London, Rapyd, a prominent global fintech company, published its latest 2026 State of Stablecoins Report. The report highlights the significant growth of stablecoins, indicating they are now integral to global commerce rather than just a niche digital asset. The study underscores that stablecoins have transitioned into mainstream financial tools, with nearly 1 in 5 businesses leveraging them. Looking forward, a majority of 76% anticipate stablecoins to continue their widespread adoption, signaling a pivotal moment in the financial industry.

Report shows Picton Property Income Ltd's holdings represent 7.8% stake.

data.title: The RMR Group earned $23.6 million in incentive fees for 2025 from clients like Diversified Healthcare Trust and Industrial Logistics Properties Trust.
data.description: Newton, Massachusetts - The RMR Group (Nasdaq: RMR) revealed today that a sum of $23.6 million in incentive business management fees has been achieved for the 2025 calendar year, determined by a three-year measurement period concluding on December 31, 2025. The breakdown of earned incentive business management fees in millions of dollars is as follows: Diversified Healthcare Trust earned $17.9 million while Industrial Logistics Properties Trust earned $5.7 million, bringing the total to $23.6 million.

data.title: Canada's construction industry rebounded with 2.2% growth in 2025, driven by infrastructure and renewables. Expected 2.8% annual growth from 2026-2029.
data.description: In Toronto, Canada, the construction industry is forecasted to bounce back with a growth of 2.2% in 2025 as per Linesight’s recent Construction Market Insights report. This growth follows two years of contraction. The resurgence is primarily fueled by infrastructure and renewable energy projects, as well as advancements in industrial construction within the chemical and pharmaceutical sectors. Looking ahead, between 2026 and 2029, construction output is anticipated to increase at an average yearly rate of 2.8%, propelled by substantial investments in transportation and renewable energy.

data.title: US construction industry rebounding in 2026 after 2.7% contraction in 2025, with growth in key sectors.
data.description: New York-based company Linesight has published its most recent Construction Market Insights report, indicating a positive forecast for the US construction sector post a weaker performance in 2025. The report shows a 2.7% decline in output for 2025 after a significant 6.5% increase in 2024. However, sectors such as data centers, transport infrastructure, semiconductors, and advanced manufacturing are forecasted to contribute to a steady growth in 2026. Moving forward, it is anticipated that the US construction industry will see a consistent average annual growth rate.

data.title: FWA Infrastructure and CPE spending to exceed $10 billion yearly till 2029. Global subscriptions remain robust.
data.description: Residential and enterprise subscriptions worldwide continue to grow at a rapid pace, with no signs of slowing down. A report from Dell'Oro Group revealed that the global market for telecommunications, security, networks, and data services is flourishing. The report, published on January 14, 2026, highlights significant increases in subscriptions across both residential and enterprise sectors. This data underscores the strong demand for these services, with numbers reaching unprecedented levels. The report from Dell'Oro Group serves as a reliable resource for tracking and analyzing market trends in these industries.

data.title: Lazard (NYSE: LAZ) will unveil its Q4 & full year 2025 financial results on January 29, 2026.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, Lazard, Inc. (NYSE: LAZ) disclosed that it will unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on Thursday, January 29, 2026. The press release containing this information will be accessible in the News & Announcements section of Lazard's platform.

data.title: House of Vanderbilt adds Impact Partners co-founders to advisory board; enhancing global strategic reach. (Words: 96)
data.description: House of Vanderbilt recently announced its strategic expansion into global communications, reputation leadership, and the family office ecosystem. Established by Consuelo, the first official family office of the Vanderbilt family, this move signifies a significant progression for the company. The expansion, effective January 14, 2026, aims to bolster House of Vanderbilt's reach and influence in various sectors. This development marks a crucial milestone and demonstrates the company's commitment to growth and innovation in these key areas.

data.title: Sensata Technologies introduces STEV Series high-voltage contactors for EVs, promising efficiency and protection for growing demands.
data.description: In SWINDON, United Kingdom, Sensata has introduced the STEV high-voltage contactors designed specifically for Electric Vehicles (EVs). These contactors are crafted to deliver optimal efficiency and durable protection to cater to the changing requirements of EVs. The launch of STEV by Sensata represents a significant step towards enhancing the performance and safety standards in the EV industry.

data.title: AEye partners with Vueron to integrate 3D perception software into OPTIS™ ecosystem for real-time detection in automotive, infrastr.
data.description: In Pleasanton, California, AEye, Inc. (Nasdaq: LIDR) revealed a new collaboration with Vueron to integrate Vueron’s advanced real-time 3D perception software into the OPTIS™ ecosystem. This partnership aims to enhance the capabilities of OPTIS™, AEye’s comprehensive 3D visual awareness system, by incorporating Vueron’s cutting-edge technology. By merging forces, AEye and Vueron seek to provide real-time detection and analysis solutions to various essential applications, particularly in the automotive and infrastructure sectors. This move is part of AEye’s strategy to broaden the scope of OPTIS™ and deliver top-tier lidar solutions.

data.title: Hyatt partners with Audi Revolut F1 Team to offer luxury experiences for elite motorsport fans. #hospitality #F1 #partnership
data.description: Hyatt Hotels Corporation (NYSE: H) revealed that World of Hyatt will serve as the official hospitality partner for the recently launched Audi Revolut F1 Team, aligning two renowned global brands known for their unwavering commitment to excellence and customer experience. This partnership marks World of Hyatt's role in enhancing the luxury travel experience by providing exclusive opportunities and services that connect guests with the elite motorsport world. World of Hyatt's involvement reflects its dedication to offering premium experiences to its guests.

data.title: Dark Wolf expands focus on data, AI, and products to address security threats. They have 4 practice areas and nearly 40 technology accelerators.
data.description: A company based in Herndon, Virginia, has announced a rebranding to enhance its response to increasing global security risks. Dark Wolf is transforming its brand to showcase its extended capabilities, including mission-enabling accelerators and secure product offerings. The company's enhanced abilities will be structured into four main practice areas: Cybersecurity, Software Delivery and Cloud, Data and AI, and Mission Enablement. Supporting these areas are around 40 technology accelerators created with input from clients to tackle various challenges.

data.title: Veritone aims to support Dept of War's AI strategy with AI-first, open architecture solutions. #VERI #AI #DeptofWar
data.description: Veritone, Inc. (NASDAQ: VERI), based in Irvine, California, is at the forefront of enterprise AI and data solutions. The company is well-prepared to support the Department of War's AI-first strategy announced on January 9, 2026. This strategy focuses on promoting AI adoption by implementing an AI-first approach and utilizing modular, open system architectures. Veritone is geared towards assisting operators and acquisition leaders by providing user-friendly infrastructure and a data advantage to facilitate the transition to AI technology.
